temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on the face of a man with dark hair and a goatee. He is wearing a dark suit jacket. The lighting is dramatic, casting a cool, blueish hue on his face and the dark, smoky background. A plume of smoke drifts in front of him. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters are visible. The camera remains steady, capturing his intense and serious expression as he looks slightly off-camera. A man speaks in a low, serious, and commanding tone, his voice filled with a sense of gravity and warning. He says, "别乱说话" (Don't talk nonsense). The background is quiet, with only a faint, low ambient hum, creating a tense and focused atmosphere. The camera angle shifts to an over-the-shoulder view, now focusing on a second man. This man wears glasses, a suit, and a tie. He looks down with a concerned or somber expression. The first man's shoulder is visible in the foreground on the left. The same white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner. The background is dark and indistinct, maintaining the moody atmosphere. The camera is static, holding the close-up on the second man's face.
